parameters.name: active
parameters.label: Active
parameters.description: When disabled, the will zero out all channels.

parameters.name: source
parameters.label: Source OP
parameters.description: Select the source operator type for the laser image.

parameters.name: sop
parameters.label: SOP
parameters.description: to the . The 's position and color attributes (as well as other miscellaneous attributes such as ) will be used to generate the laser points.

parameters.name: chop
parameters.label: CHOP
parameters.description: to the . The input must have , channels for the point positions. In addition, it also supports , , , , and channels. The channel is used for grouping points together as a single shape. By default when

parameters.name: pop
parameters.label: POP
parameters.description: to the . The 's position and color attributes (as well as other miscellaneous attributes such as ) will be used to generate the laser points.

parameters.name: outputrate
parameters.label: Output Sample Rate
parameters.description: The sample rate of the Laser , and the sample rate at which it will output to the laser. With the default 48000 samples per second and a 60fps frame rate, the Laser can output 800 position and color v

parameters.name: swap
parameters.label: Swap Output
parameters.description: Lets you swap the x and y axis of the output.

parameters.name: xscale
parameters.label: X Scale
parameters.description: Control the horizontal scale of the output.

parameters.name: yscale
parameters.label: Y Scale
parameters.description: Control the vertical scale of the output.

parameters.name: rotate
parameters.label: Rotate
parameters.description: Control the rotation of the output.

parameters.name: camera
parameters.label: Camera
parameters.description: Specify the path to a Camera used to draw a from the cameras view.

parameters.name: updatemethod
parameters.label: Update Method
parameters.description: Control how the Laser pulls data from its source.

parameters.name: startpulse
parameters.label: Frame Start Pulse
parameters.description: When enabled, will insert a sample with all colors set to -1 at the beginning of the laser frame.

parameters.name: debugchan
parameters.label: Debug Channel
parameters.description: When enabled, an extra channel with point state will be included:

parameters.name: cornerattr
parameters.label: Corner Attribute Name
parameters.description: For and inputs, optionally change the point attribute name used to specifiy if a point is a corner point. Default is .

parameters.name: cornerholdaddattr
parameters.label: Corner Hold Add Attribute Name
parameters.description: For and inputs, optionally change the name of the point attribute used to add a constant value to the corner hold time. Default is .

parameters.name: cornerholdfactorattr
parameters.label: Corner Hold Factor Attribute Name
parameters.description: For and inputs, optionally change the name of the point attribute used to apply a lookup factor to the corner point hold. Default is .

parameters.name: stepsize
parameters.label: Step Size
parameters.description: The distance each x,y can change while outputing color.

parameters.name: bstepsize
parameters.label: Blanking Step Size
parameters.description: The distance each x,y can change while not outputing color (blanking).

parameters.name: mincornerhold
parameters.label: Minimum Corner Hold
parameters.description: The minimum value of the corner hold of a point. The value of the corner hold of a point is calculated linearly in the range from the minimum to maximum corner hold, based on the steepness of the angl

parameters.name: maxcornerhold
parameters.label: Maximum Corner Hold
parameters.description: The maximum value of the corner hold of a point. See Minimum corner Hold for more details. When the angle at the point is 0 degrees, then the corner hold will be the maximum value. If the maximum valu

parameters.name: cornerholdchop
parameters.label: Corner Hold Lookup CHOP
parameters.description: to a to use as the custom lookup curve when interpolating from min to max hold. By default (ie. when no is specified), then it is linearly interpolated.

parameters.name: closedoverlap
parameters.label: Closed Shape Overlap
parameters.description: For closed shapes, the number of points (specified in milliseconds) to overlap the start/end, to utilize color interpolation and get a more uniform shape.

parameters.name: redscale
parameters.label: Red Scale
parameters.description: Set the intensity of the Red .

parameters.name: greenscale
parameters.label: Green Scale
parameters.description: Set the intensity of the Green .

parameters.name: bluescale
parameters.label: Blue Scale
parameters.description: Set the intensity of the Blue .

parameters.name: preblankon
parameters.label: Pre Blanking On Delay
parameters.description: Set the time in ms the Laser should wait at a position before turning the color output off.

parameters.name: postblankon
parameters.label: Post Blanking On Delay
parameters.description: Set the time in ms the Laser should wait at a position after turning the color output off.

parameters.name: preblankoff
parameters.label: Pre Blanking Off Delay
parameters.description: Set the time in ms the Laser should wait at a position before turning the color output on.

parameters.name: postblankoff
parameters.label: Post Blanking Off Delay
parameters.description: Set the time in ms the Laser should wait at a position after turning the color output on.

parameters.name: colordelay
parameters.label: Color Delay
parameters.description: Set the delay in ms of the color channels in the output.

parameters.name: interpcolors
parameters.label: Interpolate Colors
parameters.description: When enabled, interpolates colors between points.

parameters.name: brightnesscurvechop
parameters.label: Brightness Curve Lookup CHOP
parameters.description: a to use as a custom look-up for soft-edge blending of closed shapes.

parameters.name: timeslice
parameters.label: Time Slice
parameters.description: Turning this on forces the channels to be " ".  A is the time between the last cook frame and the current cook frame.

parameters.name: scope
parameters.label: Scope
parameters.description: To determine which channels get affected, some CHOPs use a string on the Common page.

parameters.name: srselect
parameters.label: Sample Rate Match
parameters.description: Handle cases where multiple input CHOPs' sample rates are different. When Resampling occurs, the curves are interpolated according to the Interpolation Method Option, or "Linear" if the Interpolate Op

parameters.name: exportmethod
parameters.label: Export Method
parameters.description: This will determine how to connect the channel to the parameter. Refer to the article for more information.

parameters.name: autoexportroot
parameters.label: Export Root
parameters.description: This path points to the root node where all of the paths that exporting by are relative to.

parameters.name: exporttable
parameters.label: Export Table
parameters.description: The used to hold the export information when using the Table Methods (See above).
